reason: Tests require gold-specific implementation details (exact class name '_PendingWeightUpdateBucket', exact field names 'handles' and 'fut', exact method naming conventions with 'async' and '_wait'). The tests check these via AST parsing, not behavioral verification. The instruction cannot avoid 'solution leakage' because the tests themselves verify exact implementation patterns — any instruction sufficient for an agent to pass the tests necessarily dictates the solution. This is a test design problem (tests_verify_behavior_not_text, solution_uniqueness_guard, anti_cheating_measures, behavior_in_tests) not an instruction problem.
